name: bookface
title: Bookface
description: Search Bookface and chat with the YC Agent from Raycast.
author: chrismessina

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search YC
commands.description: Search Bookface for companies, people, and posts.
commands.subtitle: Bookface

commands.name: ask
commands.title: Ask YC Agent
commands.description: Ask the YC agent questions about the network, investors, fundraising, and more.
commands.subtitle: Bookface

commands.name: account
commands.title: YC Account
commands.description: Show the currently logged-in Bookface account.
commands.subtitle: Bookface

commands.name: logout
commands.title: Log out of YC
commands.description: Log out and clear stored YC CLI credentials from ~/.yc.
commands.subtitle: Bookface

preferences.name: ycPath
preferences.title: yc CLI Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the yc binary. If empty, the extension searches $PATH for yc or ycp, then falls back to ~/.local/bin, /opt/homebrew/bin, and /usr/local/bin.

preferences.name: verboseLogging
preferences.title: Verbose Logging
preferences.label: Enable verbose logging
preferences.description: Sensitive values are redacted. Useful for diagnosing search issues.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
